titleStmt.title: SII 8.717: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 717. (A.R. No. 401 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kopperuñciṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu
8vatu kaṟkaṭaṉāyaṟṟu tiyati pattiṉāl taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr vaṭapiṭākai maturān
takapperiḷamaināṭṭup paḷḷippaṭaiyāṉa vikkiramacoḻanallūril vikkiramacoḻaṉ
teṅkutiruvitiyil teṉpakkattu Eḻuntaruḷiiruntu pūcai koṇṭaruḷukiṟa nāyaṉār vāra
ṇavācimātevar koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevar tiruvaruḷāl Ikkoyil śrīmahe
śvara kkaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷum tevarkaṉmi koyilkkaṇakkarum Ivvaṉaivom piḷ
ḷai Aracūruṭaiyār perumāḷppiḷḷaiyāṉa coḻakoṉukku nāṅkaḷ vilaippiramāṇa
t tiṭṭuk kuṭuttaparicāvatu . vikkiramacoḻaṉ teṅkutiruvitiyil teṉpakkattu Eḻuntaruḷivi
kkiṟa piṭāriyārkku śrī koyilum tirumuṟṟamumāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam vikkirama coḻanal
lūrpāl śrī cuntaracoḻavatikku meṟkku kaṇṭarātittavāykkālukku teṟku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉ
ṟāñ(ca)catirattu viṟṟukkuṭukkum śrīkoyilum tirumuṟṟamumāṉa nilattuk kellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmat
tukkāṇiyāṉa nilattukku kiḻakku vikkiramacoḻaṉ teṅkutiruvitikku teṟkuppaṭṭa Ampalaṉātaṉvāyk
kālcevvaiyāy teṅku vaitta tiruvitikkut teṟkum Inta vāraṇavācināyaṉār melai
ttirumaṭaiviḷākattum vāyniḷattukku meṟkkum Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa
nilattukku vaṭakkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum Uṭppaṭṭa vanta nilaṅ kuḻi Aimpatiṉāl
nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻḻakkālukku vilaippaṭi kācu Āyiram . Ivvilai kalveṭṭittu The words kalveṭṭittu appear to have been attempted to be erased.
Digital edition of SII 8.717 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
